title: Arch VI
description:
Defines ARCH parameters (Z height to move before beginning horizontal motion) for use with the JUMP instructions.

Inputs

Spel Ref
		 In	Spel reference from a previous Spel
		 Ref Out.

Error In	Error condition from a previous Spel
		 node.

Arch Number	The depart distance in millimeters moved
		 at the beginning of the Jump instruction before starting horizontal
		 motion.

Depart Dist	The depart distance in millimeters moved
		 at the beginning of the Jump instruction before starting horizontal
		 motion.

Appro Dist	The approach distance in millimeters
		 above the target position of the Jump instruction.

Outputs

Spel Ref
		 Out	Spel reference output for next VI to
		 use.

Error Out	Error condition output for subsequent
		 Spel nodes.
